moat_analysis.details: Poor ROIC: Never exceeds 15% threshold; Strong pricing power: Gross margins consistently improving; Low capital requirements: Avg capex 1.2% of revenue; Significant goodwill/intangible assets, suggesting brand value or IP

management_analysis.details: Excellent cash conversion: FCF/NI ratio of 22.41; Conservative debt management: D/E ratio of 0.15; Prudent cash management: Cash/Revenue ratio of 0.10; No insider trading data available; Stable share count: Limited dilution

predictability_analysis.details: Moderately predictable revenue: 3.8% avg growth with some volatility; Highly predictable operations: Operating income positive in all periods; Highly predictable margins: 7.3% avg with minimal volatility; Highly predictable cash generation: Positive FCF in all periods

valuation_analysis.details: Fair value: 3.1% FCF yield; Expensive: 53.4% premium to reasonable value; Growing FCF trend adds to intrinsic value
